name: Dual VCA 1U
description: Dual linear VCA in 1U format. IN A normalizes to IN B; CV A normalizes to CV B. VCA A output normalizes to VCA B for stereo or summed mono operation. Unity gain at 5V CV.

inputs.name: IN A
inputs.description: Audio or CV input for VCA A. Normalizes to IN B when IN B is unpatched.

inputs.name: CV A
inputs.description: CV control for VCA A gain. 0V = no output, 5V = unity, 10V = +6dB. Normalizes to CV B.

inputs.name: IN B
inputs.description: Audio or CV input for VCA B.

inputs.name: CV B
inputs.description: CV control for VCA B gain.

outputs.name: VCA A
outputs.description: Output of VCA A. If unpatched, VCA A mixes into VCA B output.

outputs.name: VCA B
outputs.description: Output of VCA B. Contains sum of A+B when VCA A jack is unpatched.

behaviors.name: Stereo VCA
behaviors.trigger: cables → both IN A and IN B
behaviors.description: Both channels operate independently. Patch separate CV to each for independent gain control of a stereo signal.

behaviors.name: Summing mixer
behaviors.description: With VCA A jack empty, both channels are summed and appear at VCA B output. Single CV A controls both if CV B is also unpatched.

behaviors.name: Single-input dual send
behaviors.trigger: IN A patched, IN B unpatched
behaviors.description: IN A normalizes to IN B, so one source can be independently level-controlled to two destinations.

patchIdeas.name: Stereo tremolo
patchIdeas.patch: Osc L → IN A · Osc R → IN B · LFO → CV A (normalizes to CV B)
patchIdeas.diagram:
Dual VCA 1U:
- Osc L (Out) -> Dual VCA 1U (IN A)
- Osc R (Out) -> Dual VCA 1U (IN B)
- LFO (Out) >> Dual VCA 1U (CV A) // normalizes to CV B
- Dual VCA 1U (VCA A) -> Mixer (L)
- Dual VCA 1U (VCA B) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Envelope shaping
patchIdeas.patch: Audio → IN A · Envelope → CV A · VCA A out → mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Dual VCA 1U:
- VCO (Out) -> Dual VCA 1U (IN A)
- Envelope (Out) >> Dual VCA 1U (CV A)
- Dual VCA 1U (VCA A) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Summed mono with two sources
patchIdeas.patch: Source1 → IN A · Source2 → IN B · leave VCA A unpatched · VCA B = mix
patchIdeas.diagram:
Dual VCA 1U:
- Source1 (Out) -> Dual VCA 1U (IN A)
- Source2 (Out) -> Dual VCA 1U (IN B)
- Envelope (Out) >> Dual VCA 1U (CV A)
- Envelope2 (Out) >> Dual VCA 1U (CV B)
- Dual VCA 1U (VCA B) -> Mixer (In) // A sums into B
